reviews.comment:
La estación de servicio es muy buena. Los playeros muy lentos y displicentes.

(Translated by Google)
The gas station is very good. The attendants are very slow and indifferent.

reviews.comment:
Buen lugar para cargar el problema ahora es que están arreglando la ruta y es un poco incómodo.
El Eshop muy bueno

(Translated by Google)
Good place to charge, the problem now is they're fixing the road and it's a bit inconvenient.
The eShop is very good.

reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención, me tocó en un cambio de turno, muy ágiles los playeros, excelente, no tardaron ni 5 minutos.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service, I was served during a shift change, the beach attendants were very efficient, excellent, they didn't even take 5 minutes.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7652943530366249800/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURfMXUyTlp3EAE

reviews.comment:
La verdad una desilusión con la propuesta que poseen sin tacc. Desarmada, sin sabor y además con la sal sin logo con lo cual no la pude consumir. Muy mala experiencia! Les recomiendo a los celíacos que busquen otro lugar!

(Translated by Google)
Honestly, I was disappointed with their gluten-free options. The food was falling apart, tasteless, and the salt didn't have the logo, so I couldn't eat it. A very bad experience! I recommend that people with celiac disease look elsewhere!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7652943530366249800/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURfZ3R5Wm9RRRAB

os

reviews.comment:
Vivo cerca y no cargo, porque los playeros se arrastran... Pocas ganas le ponen. En general voy a otro lugar porque hay mucha espera.

(Translated by Google)
I live nearby and I don't buy anything because the beachgoers drag their feet... They don't seem to care. I usually go somewhere else because there's such a long wait.
